headline: Assessing Axon Enterprise (AXON) Valuation After A Sharp Pullback In Long Term Winners
summary: Axon Enterprise (AXON) stock has drawn fresh attention after recent trading left it about 29% lower year to date, with the share price last closing at US$398.44 and longer term returns still positive. See our latest analysis for Axon Enterprise. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 1-day share price return of 1.55% and a 7-day gain of 5.74%. However, the year-to-date share price return is still down 29.29%, and the 1-year total shareholder return has declined 45.82%. This is despite 3-year...
